title: Menlo Ventures’ Matt Murphy explains why Anthropic is winning (and it’s not the model)
excerpt: Watch as Menlo's Matt Murphy joins Equity to discuss backing Anthropic early, AI startup growth, and more.
content_html:
Loading the player…

Anthropic leaped to a $47 billion revenue run rate by May, compared to $9 billion in 2025. It’s the kind of growth that Menlo Ventures’ Matt Murphy says he’s never seen in 25 years of investing, not in the internet wave, not in mobile, not in the first cloud boom. Menlo led Anthropic’s $500M Series D, and Murphy has had a front-row seat as the company went from a pre-revenue, pre-launch bet to one of the most valuable startups out there. 

On this episode of TechCrunch’s Equity podcast, Julie Bort talks with Murphy about backing Anthropic before anyone else would, why a great model was never the point, and what’s driving the fastest-growing startups he’s ever seen. 

Subscribe to Equity on YouTube, Apple Podcasts, Overcast, Spotify and all the casts. You also can follow Equity on X and Threads, at @EquityPod. 

Topics

Theresa Loconsolo is an audio producer at TechCrunch focusing on Equity, the network’s flagship podcast. Before joining TechCrunch in 2022, she was one of 2 producers at a four-station conglomerate where she wrote, recorded, voiced and edited content, and engineered live performances and interviews from guests like lovelytheband. Theresa is based in New Jersey and holds a bachelors degree in Communication from Monmouth University.

You can contact or verify outreach from Theresa by emailing theresa.loconsolo@techcrunch.com.

content_html_zh:
正在加载播放器...

到 5 月份，Anthropic 的收入运行率跃升至 470 亿美元，而 2025 年为 90 亿美元。 Menlo Ventures 的马特·墨菲 (Matt Murphy) 表示，他在 25 年的投资生涯中从未见过这种增长，无论是在互联网浪潮、移动领域还是第一次云计算热潮中都没有见过。 Menlo 领导了 Anthropic 5 亿美元的 D 轮融资，随着该公司从一个收入前、发布前的赌注发展成为最有价值的初创公司之一，Murphy 占据了前排席位。

在 TechCrunch 股票播客的这一集中，朱莉·博特 (Julie Bort) 与墨菲讨论了如何抢在其他人之前支持 Anthropic、为什么伟大的模型从来都不是重点，以及是什么推动了他所见过的增长最快的初创公司。

在 YouTube、Apple Podcasts、Overcast、Spotify 和所有演员上订阅 Equity。 您还可以关注@EquityPod 上的 Equity on X and Threads。

主题

Theresa Loconsolo 是 TechCrunch 的音频制作人，专注于该网络的旗舰播客 Equity。 在 2022 年加入 TechCrunch 之前，她是一家拥有四个电台的企业集团的 2 名制作人之一，负责撰写、录制、配音和编辑内容，并设计现场表演和来自 Lovelytheband 等嘉宾的采访。 Theresa 居住在新泽西州，拥有蒙茅斯大学传播学学士学位。

您可以通过发送电子邮件至 Theresa.loconsolo@techcrunch.com 来联系或验证 Theresa 的联系。
